title: flex_attention does not output the full attention_weights with output_attention option
issue_summary: When output_attentions was requested through the flex_attention path, the implementation returned the wrong object instead of a full attention-weight tensor.

root_cause.summary: The attention API surfaced a summary quantity from the flex_attention path rather than the actual attention matrix expected by callers.

symptom: The returned attention payload has the wrong shape and semantics, so downstream code asking for attention weights receives an invalid substitute.

local_reproduction.mapping: The local case returns a logsumexp vector in the buggy path and the full softmax attention matrix in the fixed path, matching the shape and semantic mismatch described in the issue.

issue_contract.trigger: Request attention outputs from the flex_attention path.
issue_contract.mechanism: The buggy path returns a summary statistic instead of the attention-weight matrix.
issue_contract.observable_symptom: The returned attention payload has the wrong shape and semantics.

reproduction_scope.mechanism_level_claim: This case reproduces the wrong-return-object bug in the attention-output path.
reproduction_scope.issue_level_observable_claim: This case reproduces the reported observable symptom that the returned attention payload has the wrong shape and meaning.
